channel.title: Latest News on DailyGrass
channel.description: Recent content in Latest News on DailyGrass

item.title: Elon Musk and Tim Cook Join Trump on Diplomatic Visit to China
item.description: Tech CEOs Elon Musk and Tim Cook have been invited to accompany Donald Trump on a high-profile diplomatic visit to China, signaling a potential thaw in trade tensions.

item.title: Georgia's Raffensperger Tests the Future of the GOP
item.description: Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger’s continued prominence in the GOP is testing whether the party can move past the 2020 election controversies.

item.title: Karl Rove Warns New GOP Election Maps Could Backfire on Republicans
item.description: Veteran Republican strategist Karl Rove cautions that newly drawn GOP-leaning congressional maps may backfire, costing the party seats in competitive districts.

item.title: Labour MPs Call for Starmer's Resignation Amid Leadership Crisis
item.description: A growing number of Labour MPs are calling for Prime Minister Keir Starmer to step down, deepening a leadership crisis within the ruling party.

item.title: UK Government Announces Plans to Nationalise British Steel
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced the government’s intention to nationalise British Steel, citing national security and industrial strategy concerns.
